title: Enchant Lab
description: A mod with an enchanter GUI that lets you enchant your items beyond normal limits on the client side.
body:
🔬 **Enchant Lab** – *Next-Level Enchanting Made Simple!* ✨  
*Version: Fabric 1.21.4*

Say goodbye to wasting your time looking up enchant components! **Enchant Lab** brings a powerful and user-friendly GUI to Minecraft, letting you pick the exact enchantments you want – no complicated commands required! 🛠️📘

🎯 **Key Features:**  
- 🧪 Sleek, intuitive GUI for enchanting items  
- 📚 Browse and select any available enchantment  
- ⚡ Adjust levels and combine enchantments. 
- 🛡️ **Compatible with all items!**
- 🎮 Great for server owners/admins who don't wanna deal with commands.
- 🔧 You don't even need Operator **just creative mode!**

🧩 **Requires:** [LibGui v12.0.1](https://github.com/CottonMC/LibGui/releases/tag/12.0.1)  
🔧 *Drop both `Enchant Lab` and `LibGui` into your `mods` folder.*

💎 Make your gear legendary – your way, with **Enchant Lab**.
